Robot Subject

OriginMan

An open humanoid robot subject built around ROS2, embodied intelligence, and hands-on development.

OriginMan is a future-oriented desktop humanoid robot project. Learners move from system understanding to setup practice and guided operation through a structured sequence of courses.

Courses3
Lessons3

Subject focus

Courses focused on humanoid setup, motion systems, and interactive behaviors.

Open access

Start Here

Public courses designed to introduce the system, workflow, and first outcome with minimal setup friction.

Open access15 min

Overview

Start with the project philosophy, intelligent platform architecture, and the complete OriginMan hardware profile.

1 lessonOpen course
Education verified

Verified Education Track

Courses for verified educators, students, and nonprofit teams who need deeper guided practice.

Education verified18 min

Quick Start

Boot, connect, and run the first guided OriginMan workflow.

1 lessonLog in to continue
Education verified14 min

User Guide

Understand startup behavior, networking, and follow-up practice after the first deployment.

1 lessonLog in to continue
